prose: Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline (14 atoms, charge 0, multiplicity 1) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RI, PySCF backend), in the gas phase, via finite difference of Mulliken partial charges on the neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (−1, doublet) species. Geometry was taken from the input .xyz at fixed coordinates (single-point; not re-optimized at DFT). The headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ index (most electrophilic site), found at atom 3 (C, f⁺ = 2.2975867). The most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (N, f⁻ = 0.20452359). Charge conservation passed: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. Integrity trustworthy: true. No warnings were reported by the engine.
